title: Bump SkiaSharp to milestone 132
body:
**Description of Change**

<!-- Describe your changes here. -->

**Bugs Fixed**

- Fixes #

<!-- Provide links to issues here. Ensure that a GitHub issue was created for your feature or bug fix before sending PR. -->

**API Changes**

### Type Changed: SkiaSharp.SKColorType

Added values:

```csharp
Bgra10101010Xr = 25,
RgbF16F16F16x = 26,
```

Both are 8 bytes/pixel. `Bgra10101010Xr` accepts any alpha type; `RgbF16F16F16x` is opaque-only.
Neither supports GL backend (`ToGlSizedFormat` returns 0) or pixel color readback.

All existing `SKColorTypeNative` enum indices shifted: e.g. `Rgba10x6` moved from native index 12 to 13, `Gray8` from 13 to 14, etc.

### Type Changed: SkiaSharp.SKJpegEncoderOptions

Added internal fields for EXIF orientation support (new in Skia m132):

```csharp
int fOrigin;    // SkEncodedOrigin value (0 = not set)
bool fHasOrigin; // whether fOrigin is set
```

These are initialized to default in both constructors but not yet exposed as public properties.

### Type Changed: SkiaSharp.GRVkBackendContextNative

Removed fields (upstream `GrVkBackendContext` → `skgpu::VulkanBackendContext`):

```csharp
// Removed:
public UInt32 fMinAPIVersion;
public UInt32 fInstanceVersion;
public UInt32 fExtensions;
public UInt32 fFeatures;
public Byte fOwnsInstanceAndDevice;
```

### Type Changed: SkiaSharp.GrVkYcbcrConversionInfo

Added VkComponentMapping fields (upstream `GrVkYcbcrConversionInfo` → `skgpu::VulkanYcbcrConversionInfo`):

```csharp
public UInt32 ComponentsR;
public UInt32 ComponentsG;
public UInt32 ComponentsB;
public UInt32 ComponentsA;
```

### Type Changed: SkiaSharp.SKManagedStream

Major refactoring of `Duplicate()` and `Fork()` semantics:

- **Removed**: Parent/child weak reference chain (`wasCopied`, `parent`, `child` fields)
- **Removed**: `VerifyOriginal()` — calling stream methods after duplication no longer throws `InvalidOperationException`
- **Added**: `ReadStreamFully()` private helper that reads the entire stream into a byte array
- **Added**: Private constructor with `weak` parameter for GC-safe native-owned streams
- `OnDuplicate()` now creates an independent `MemoryStream` copy positioned at 0
- `OnFork()` now creates an independent `MemoryStream` copy at the current position
- Original stream remains fully readable after duplication/forking
- Multiple duplicates can be created from the same parent

### Type Changed: SkiaSharp.SKAbstractManagedStream

- Added `private protected` constructor overload: `SKAbstractManagedStream(bool owns, bool weak)` to control whether native code holds a weak or strong reference

**Behavioral Changes**

#### SKManagedStream Duplicate/Fork Semantics

| Behavior | m119 | m132 |
|----------|------|------|
| Original readable after `Duplicate()` | No (`InvalidOperationException`) | **Yes** |
| Multiple duplicates from same parent | No (exception on second) | **Yes** |
| Duplicate/fork data sharing | Shared underlying stream | **Independent MemoryStream copy** |
| Child survives parent dispose | Via ownership transfer chain | **Yes** (independent copy) |

#### woff2 Typeface Loading

- m119: `SKTypeface.FromFile("file.woff2")` returned a typeface with a valid FamilyName, or null
- m132: May return a non-null typeface with **empty FamilyName**; `paint.Typeface`/`font.Typeface` getter returns a non-null default typeface rather than null

**Required skia PR**

None.

<!-- Replace this with the full URL to the skia PR. -->

**PR Checklist**

- [ ] Has tests (if omitted, state reason in description)
- [ ] Rebased on top of main at time of PR
- [ ] Merged related skia PRs
- [ ] Changes adhere to coding standard
- [ ] Updated documentation
